title: [BUS] Implement ParameterStore as central simulation state
body:
## Objective
Implement a thread-safe ParameterStore as the central state store for all simulation outputs. Models write to it, observables poll it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `ParameterStore` class in `src/svf/parameter_store.py`
- Thread-safe write(name, value, t, model_id) and read(name) methods
- snapshot() returns a full copy of current state
- Each entry carries: value (float), timestamp (float), model_id (string)
- Unit tests cover concurrent reads/writes

## Implements
SVF-DEV-031, SVF-DEV-032, SVF-DEV-033

title: [BUS] Wire ParameterStore into FmuModelAdapter and NativeModelAdapter
body:
## Objective
Replace DDS telemetry publishing in adapters with ParameterStore writes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- FmuModelAdapter and NativeModelAdapter accept a ParameterStore at construction
- on_tick() writes all outputs to the store after each step
- DDS telemetry writers removed from adapters
- Existing tests updated to pass a ParameterStore
- Integration tests confirm store is populated after simulation run

## Implements
SVF-DEV-031, SVF-DEV-033

title: [ORC] Refactor ObservableFactory to poll ParameterStore
body:
## Objective
Replace DDS-based telemetry subscriptions in ObservableFactory with ParameterStore polling.

## Acceptance Criteria
- ObservableFactory accepts a ParameterStore instead of DomainParticipant
- within() polls the store until condition met or timeout expires
- No DDS readers in ObservableFactory
- All observable tests pass
- Late-joiner problem eliminated by design

## Implements
SVF-DEV-043

title: [BUS] Implement ParameterStoreDdsBridge for external inspection
body:
## Objective
Optional bridge that mirrors ParameterStore values to DDS topics for external inspection tools and ground segment simulation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- ParameterStoreDdsBridge mirrors store writes to SVF/Telemetry/{variable} topics
- Bridge is optional — simulation runs correctly without it
- Read-only from external perspective
- Unit test confirms DDS topics receive mirrored values

## Implements
SVF-DEV-034
